# Diani Dance

Diani Dance offers beginner-friendly dance experiences in Diani Beach, Kenya, focused on tourists, couples, and groups.

## Primary pages
- Home: https://dianidance.com/
- Things to do in Diani: https://dianidance.com/things-to-do-in-diani
- Classes and events: https://dianidance.com/classes
- Packages: https://dianidance.com/packages
- Booking: https://dianidance.com/booking
- Contact: https://dianidance.com/contact

## Business details
- Area served: Diani Beach, Kwale County, Kenya
- Email: hi@dianidance.com
- Phone / WhatsApp: +254 748 191 194

## Booking summary
1. Choose dance style (Salsa, Bachata, Kizomba, or undecided).
2. Choose package.
3. Pick date and time.
4. Submit contact details.
5. Receive confirmation by email or WhatsApp.

## Audience and intent
- Tourists searching for things to do in Diani.
- Couples looking for romantic or social activities.
- Groups seeking unique shared experiences.
